entities.name: TestForge
observations: Gravador inteligente de testes com Playwright + LLM
Script generation via AST module, Playwright Python puro
Notificacoes: env vars TF_NOTIFY_EMAIL_* e TF_NOTIFY_TEAMS_WEBHOOK, desligado por padrao

entities.name: Story 1-3
observations: Execucao headed/headless, step timeout, recovery, relatorio partial

entities.name: Story 1-4
observations: Shift+A no overlay abre menu assert

entities.name: Story 1-5
observations: Relatorio em duas camadas + historico com --period e --status
CLI: testforge report <path> e testforge report --history

entities.name: Story 1-7
observations: Overlay detecta input[type=file], Playwright page.on download

entities.name: Story 1-8
observations: Shadow DOM, select com label=, date picker, autocomplete com debounce 400ms

entities.name: Decision: pointerup event capture
observations: Chromium nao dispara click/mousedown/mouseup em elementos disabled
pointerup (window, capture phase) funciona consistentemente para todos elementos
Synthetic click (isTrusted=false) em disabled sem remover atributo disabled
Listener no window (nao document) para evitar capture phase de paginas bancarias/jQuery

entities.name: Decision: fill detection
observations: Campos com mascara JS (Caixa, bancos) nao disparam input events
Detectados via keydown + verificacao periodica de valor

entities.name: Decision: selector priority
observations: Prioridade unificada overlay + builder: data-testid > id > name > aria-label > placeholder > has-text > href > alt > class > XPath/DOM path
Overlay ja gera o melhor seletor na captura (generateBestSelector)
rawSelector enviado como fallback para o data.json
Runner tenta fallbacks em sequencia via _try_with_fallbacks()

entities.name: Decision: overlay modes
observations: full: overlay com UI DOM (botoes, painel)
shortcuts: sem UI DOM, apenas listeners ativos, zero interferencia visual

entities.name: Decision: browser config
observations: Centralizado em browser_config.py para runner e session

entities.name: Decision: dialog handling
observations: page.on(dialog) com auto-accept em runner e session
alert()/confirm() bloqueiam Playwright se nao houver handler

entities.name: Decision: autocomplete detection
observations: Apos clique em .ui-menu-item, verifica valor do input focado apos 50ms
Cria fill step com valor final selecionado

entities.name: Current Session State
observations: Acabamos de configurar MCP servers: Playwright MCP, Filesystem MCP, Memory MCP, Context7 MCP
Context7 instalado via npx ctx7 setup --opencode --mcp
Project-context.md criado em .opencode/project-context.md com resumo completo
Config de projeto movida para .opencode/opencode.json (localizacao valida)
Ultima tarefa: salvar estado da sessao no Memory MCP para retomada futura
Proximo passo sugerido: fazer gravacao real da Caixa com overlay corrigido
Pending: avaliar se steps duplicados (fill Res + fill Residencial) precisam de dedup
Pending: adicionar wait_for_selector() para paginas SPA

entities.name: overlay.js
observations: generateBestSelector(), fill detection unificada, deteccao de autocomplete
Synthetic click para disabled, modo shortcuts, Shift+H hide/show

entities.name: session.py
observations: Fallback de injecao do overlay pos-load

entities.name: selectors.py
observations: Prioridade: data-testid > id > name > aria-label > placeholder > label-text > role+text > href > alt > class > XPath

entities.name: builder.py
observations: Insere raw_selector como primeiro fallback no data.json

entities.name: browser_config.py
observations: Args de lancamento e context options compartilhados

entities.name: step.py
observations: RecordedStep com attrs: dict, fallbacks: list, raw_selector: str

entities.name: README-EPIC1.md
observations: Guia manual com roteiro de teste, troubleshooting, CLI, fallbacks
